name: pre-release-policy
allowedDuringPreRelease: Replace old API, UI, enum, permission, SQL, and data contracts instead of preserving compatibility.
Rebuild or reset development data after documenting the requirement in the change record.
Remove stale implementation paths when they are inside the approved impact scope.
stillRequiresApproval: Feature deletion still requires deletion dry-run and explicit confirmation.
Compatibility layers require explicit user approval and a documented sunset reason.
Cross-module edits require expanded allowed edit roots in the active change record.
Production or released data changes require an executable migration and rollback plan.
